# Alley Admin

> Modern, web-based bowling league management software that replaces outdated desktop tools like CDE Software's BLS. Built for league secretaries, bowling alley managers, and tournament organizers.

## What It Does

Alley Admin is a single platform for managing every aspect of a bowling league:

- Team and roster management
- Weekly score entry and digital scorekeeping
- Automatic handicap calculations (USBC-compliant)
- Real-time standings and statistics
- Schedule generation and management
- Tournament bracket creation
- Performance analytics for bowlers and teams
- Financial tracking (dues, prize funds, payouts)

## Why It Exists

League secretaries currently juggle multiple pieces of desktop software (often CDE's BLS, BTM, and TBRAC) that haven't been meaningfully modernized. Alley Admin combines all of that functionality into one cloud-based web application that works on any device — no installs, no version upgrades, no per-season license fees.

## Who It's For

- League secretaries managing weekly bowling leagues
- Bowling alley managers coordinating multiple leagues
- Tournament directors organizing bracket and handicap events
- USBC-certified leagues needing compliant reporting

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Alley Admin?
Alley Admin is a web-based bowling league management application. It handles team management, digital scorekeeping, automatic handicap calculations, standings, scheduling, and tournament brackets — all in one place.

### How is Alley Admin different from CDE Software?
CDE Software (BLS, BTM, TBRAC) requires separate desktop applications for leagues, tournaments, and side pots, with per-season license purchases. Alley Admin is a single cloud-based platform that works in any browser, requires no installation, and combines all three functions.

### Is Alley Admin free?
Pricing has not been announced yet. Join the waitlist at https://alleyadmin.app to be notified when pricing and early access are available.

### What devices does Alley Admin work on?
Alley Admin runs in any modern web browser on desktop, tablet, or phone. No downloads or installations are required.

## Status

Coming soon. Join the waitlist at https://alleyadmin.app
